title: Distinguished GUI
description: This quintessential GUI pack aims to make the vanilla GUI more distinguished.
body:
### Distinguished GUI ``` This quintessential GUI resource-pack aims to make the vanilla GUI more distinguishable from itself by separating the hotbar, inventory, and container from each other. ```
Screenshots of in-game GUIs

This resource-pack updates the vanilla textures for these GUIs to make them more distinguishable from themselves.

Check out my other projects! [https://modrinth.com/user/zanderest](https://modrinth.com/user/zanderest)

In order for the custom-colored containers to work you'll need **OptiFine** or [**OptiGUI**](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) installed. | Containers Updated | Containers Updated | Containers w/ Colors | | --- | --- | --- | | Anvil | Grindstone | Shulker Boxes | | Beacon | Hopper | Ender Chest | | Blast Furnace | Entity Inventory | --- | | Brewing Stand | Inventory | --- | | Cartography Table | Loom | --- | | Crafting Table | Smithing Table | --- | | Double Chest | Smoker | --- | | Enchanting Table | Stonecutter | --- | | Chest | Villager Trading | --- |
